page: Microsoft Azure E16pds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Epdsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores powered by the ARM64 Microsoft Neoverse-N2 processor operating at 3.4 GHz. The CPU configuration includes 64 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 128 MB L3 cache, with single-threaded execution per core. This instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 945 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates strong memory performance, achieving a top-tier rating in the Passmark memory score and strong results in large-block read and write memory bandwidth tests, reaching 304.72 GB/sec and 123.05 GB/sec respectively. Single-threaded gzip compression is also strong at 33.05 GB/sec. Most other compute and database metrics, such as stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Geekbench compilation, and Redis SET operations, fall within the average range. However, prompt processing for medium-sized 7B LLM models represents a relative bottleneck, scoring in the lower tier.

From a resource density perspective, the E16pds_v6 offers a balanced cost-to-performance profile for memory-intensive ARM-native workloads. The combination of high memory capacity, dedicated physical cores, and fast local storage makes it highly suitable for database operations, memory-cached web serving, and data decompression tasks. It is less suited for heavy large-scale LLM prompt processing due to architectural constraints on complex vector instructions.
description: Microsoft Azure E16pds_v6 is an ARM64-based virtual machine from the Epdsv6 family, configured with 16 dedicated physical cores on a 3.4 GHz Microsoft Neoverse-N2 processor. It features 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB, alongside 945 GB of local storage. Operating under Microsoft Hyper-V, the instance delivers top-tier memory performance in Passmark testing and strong large-block memory bandwidth, alongside average multi-core compute and database execution. This server is optimized for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and caching layers that benefit from dedicated ARM resources and local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E16pds_v6 is an ARM64 virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated Neoverse-N2 cores, 128 GB of RAM, and 945 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier memory performance for database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E16pds_v6 is an ARM64 virtual machine with 16 dedicated cores, 128 GB RAM, and 945 GB local storage, optimized for memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: An ARM64 virtual machine delivering high memory density and dedicated physical cores for memory-intensive databases and caching workloads.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
945 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability

Best suited for database operations, caching layers, and memory-intensive ARM workloads
